info.title: POWER PaRameter Uncertainty ViEwer (PRUVE) API
info.description:
The POWER PaRameter Uncertainty ViEwer (PRUVE) API provides time-series and spatial statistical operations OR provides time-series and spatial statistics for both univariate (single-variable) and bivariate (two-variable) data, utilizing a common set of functions. The PRUVE includes statistical reports, plotting, and mapping capabilities to visualize information effectively.

The POWER PaRameter Uncertainty ViEwer (PRUVE) API enables:

* **Statistical Analyses:** This group of tools requires inputs with specific properties or attributes to produce the requested information.
* **Advanced Plots:** This group of tools requires inputs with specific properties or attributes to produce the requested information.

get.summary: Computes the descriptive statistics for a point location.
get.description:
This endpoint returns the POWER standard statistics response for a point location.

- This endpoint selects the closet location to the requested input latitude and longitude from the source projects grid.

get.description:
This endpoint returns configuration settings of the microservice.

- This includes the available data formats, time range, and more.

documentation.title: POWER PaRameter Uncertainty ViEwer (PRUVE) API
documentation.description: The POWER PaRameter Uncertainty ViEwer (PRUVE) API provides time-series and spatial statistical operations OR provides time-series and spatial statistics for both univariate (single-variable) and bivariate (two-variable) data, utilizing a common set of functions. The PRUVE includes statistical reports, plotting, and mapping capabilities to visualize information effectively.

description.title: Description
description.description: A short description of the purpose of the API.

start.title: Start
start.description: The first date of data available.

end.title: End
end.description: The last date of data available.
